function.message: Handled the next inbox item by OCR-migrating six finance records to schema-compliant YAML frontmatter in place and preserving each original note body, then deleting the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and local rulebooks; inspected 99_system, read inbox-processing, OCR, migration, and finance schema docs; preserved original note bodies; deleted the inbox item only after completing the requested structured-record maintenance.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to run six existing finance notes through the OCR workflow. The workflow and schema docs under 99_system/workflows/ and 99_system/schemas/ define OCR here as extracting visible note data into YAML frontmatter while preserving the existing body. Each of the six target files visibly contained all required invoice or bill fields and ordered line items, so the requested migration was completed in place and the processed inbox file was then deleted per the inbox workflow.
